search.title: Field-Specific Search
search.description: You can search for specific fields using two different operators: colon (:) for partial matches and equals (=) for exact matches.

examples.title: Available Fields
examples.creatorField: Search by creator name across all roles (e.g., 'creator:Nep' or 'creator=Nephrolepis')

numeric.title: BPM, tile count, and chart length
numeric.description: Filter by BPM (bpm:), tile count (tilecount:), or chart length in milliseconds (time:). For time:, use h, m, s, or ms units (e.g. 10m15s, 50s), or a plain number as milliseconds. Prefix with >, <, >=, or <= for ranges. Separate multiple conditions with commas (AND) within the same search group.

examples.title: Numeric examples
examples.bpmRange: BPM strictly between 100 and 200 (use >= or <= if you want inclusive bounds)
examples.timeComposite: Levels longer than 10 minutes 15 seconds (chart length)
examples.timeMsPlain: Levels longer than 130000 ms (plain number = milliseconds)
examples.combine: Combine with song/artist filters, e.g. song:hello, bpm:>150

operators.title: Search Operators
operators.description: You can combine multiple search conditions using operators.

examples.title: Operator Examples
examples.and: Search for levels that match both conditions (AND). This will look for charts of 'hello' by 'camellia'
examples.or: Search for levels that match either condition (OR). This searches for either goTe charts (without EX) or any XNOR charts
examples.complex: Complex search combining AND and OR conditions. This looks for 'onus' charts by 'gazizi' or any charts with song by 'ludicin'
examples.not: Usage of '\!' will exclude results containing the term - this expression will exclude 'nerfed' onus charts

points.caseSensitive: Searches are case-insensitive - 'SONG' and 'song' will give the same results
points.partial: Colon (:) allows partial matches - 'song:Ex' will match 'Example'
points.exact: Equals (=) requires exact matches - 'song=Example' will only match 'Example'
points.spaces: Spaces are allowed in search terms - 'song:Example Song' works
points.order: The order of conditions doesn't matter within each group
points.roles: Use 'creator' to search across all roles, or 'charter'/'vfxer' for specific roles
